questions.question: Complete this Queen lyric from 'Bohemian Rhapsody': '_____, just killed a man.'
Complete this John Lennon lyric from 'Imagine': 'Imagine there's no heaven, it's easy if you _____.'
Complete this Guns N' Roses lyric from 'Sweet Child O' Mine': 'She's got a smile that it seems to me, reminds me of childhood _____.'
Complete this Michael Jackson lyric from 'Billie Jean': 'But the kid is not my _____.'
Complete this Bob Dylan lyric from 'Like a Rolling Stone': 'How does it feel to be on your _____?'
Complete this The Beatles lyric from 'Yesterday': 'Yesterday, all my troubles seemed so _____ away.'
Complete this The Eagles lyric from 'Hotel California': 'You can _________ any time you like, but you can never leave.'
Complete this Nirvana lyric from 'Smells Like Teen Spirit': 'I feel stupid and contagious. Here we are now, _____ us.'
Complete this Oasis lyric from 'Wonderwall': '________ is gonna be the day that they're gonna throw it back to you.'
Complete this Neil Diamond lyric from 'Sweet Caroline': 'Sweet Caroline, good times never seemed so _____.'
Complete this Bon Jovi lyric from 'Livin' on a Prayer': 'Whoa, we're _________ there, whoa, livin' on a prayer.'
Complete this Journey lyric from 'Don't Stop Believin'': 'Don't stop believin', hold on to that _____.'
Complete this Smash Mouth lyric from 'All Star': 'Somebody once told me the world is gonna roll me, I ain't the sharpest tool in the _____.'
Complete this The Beatles lyric from 'Hey Jude': 'Hey Jude, don't make it _____. Take a sad song, and make it better.'
Complete this Billy Joel lyric from 'Piano Man': 'It's nine o'clock on a Saturday, the ________ crowd shuffles in, there's an old man sitting next to me, making love to his tonic and gin.'
Complete this The Police lyric from 'Every Breath You Take': 'Every breath you take, every move you _____.'
Complete this Pharrell Williams lyric from 'Happy': 'Clap along if you feel like a room without a ______ .'
Complete this The Beatles lyric from 'Let It Be': 'When I find myself in times of __________, Mother Mary comes to me.'
Complete this Adele lyric from 'Rolling in the Deep': 'There's a fire starting in my heart, reaching a ____________ and it's bringing me out the dark.'
Complete this Ed Sheeran lyric: 'I'm in love with the _____ of you.'
Complete this Prince lyric from 'Purple Rain': 'I never meant to cause you any _____, I never meant to cause you any pain.'
Complete this Led Zeppelin lyric: 'There's a lady who's sure all that glitters is gold, and she's buying a _____ to heaven.'
Complete this Michael Jackson lyric from 'Thriller': ''Cause this is thriller, thriller night. And no one's gonna save you from the _________ about to strike.'
Complete this Bruce Springsteen lyric from 'Born to Run': '_______ like us, baby we were baby to run.'
Complete this Nirvana lyric from 'Smells Like Teen Spirit': 'A mulatto, an albino, a mosquito, my _____.'
Complete this Queen lyric from 'Bohemian Rhapsody': 'Scaramouche, Scaramouche, will you do the _____?'
Complete this Madonna lyric from 'Like a Prayer': 'Life is a mystery, everyone must stand _____.'
Complete this Eurythmics lyric: 'Sweet dreams are made of this, who am I to disagree? I travel the world and the __________ . Everybody's looking for something.'
Complete this The Police lyric from 'Every Breath You Take': 'Every little thing she does is _____.'
Complete this Oasis lyric from 'Wonderwall': 'I don't believe that anybody feels the way I do about you _____.'
Complete this Bob Dylan lyric from 'All Along the Watchtower': 'All along the watchtower, princes kept the _____.'
Complete this Nine Inch Nails lyric from 'Hurt': 'I hurt myself today, to see if I still _____.'
Complete this Radiohead lyric from 'Creep': 'I wish I was special, you're so very _____.'
Complete this R.E.M. lyric from 'Losing My Religion': 'That's me in the corner, that's me in the _____.'
Complete this Soundgarden lyric from 'Black Hole Sun': 'Black hole sun, won't you come, and wash away the _____.'
Complete this The Cranberries lyric from 'Zombie': 'In your head, in your _____, they're fighting.'
Complete this Eric Clapton lyric from 'Tears in Heaven': 'Would you know my ______, if I saw you in Heaven?'
Complete this Metallica lyric from 'Nothing Else Matters': 'So close, no matter how far, couldn't be much more from the _____.'
Complete this Fugees lyric from 'Killing Me Softly': 'Strumming my pain with his fingers, singing my life with his _____.'
Complete this TLC lyric from 'Waterfalls': 'Don't go _______ waterfalls.'
Complete this The Who lyric from 'Baba O'Riley': 'It's only teenage _____.'
Complete this The Rolling Stones lyric from 'Paint It Black': 'I see a red ______ and I want it painted black.'
Complete this Taylor Swift lyric from 'Blank Space': 'Got a long list of ex-lovers, they'll tell you I'm _____.'
Complete this Rihanna lyric from 'Umbrella': 'You had my heart, and we'll never be ________ apart.'
Complete this Katy Perry lyric from 'Firework': 'Cause baby, you're a firework. Come on, show 'em what you're ________.'
Complete this Taylor Swift lyric from 'Love Story': 'Romeo, take me somewhere we can be _____.'
Complete this Lady Gaga lyric: 'Can't read my, can't read my, no, he can't read my _____ face.'
Complete this Rihanna lyric from 'We Found Love': 'We found love in a _____ place.'
Complete this Carly Rae Jepsen lyric from 'Call Me Maybe': 'Hey, I just met you, and this is crazy, but here's my _____, so call me, maybe.'
Complete this Katy Perry lyric from 'Roar': 'I got the eye of the tiger, a fighter, dancing through the _____.'
Complete this Taylor Swift lyric from 'Shake It Off': 'I'm dancing on my own, I make the moves up as I _____.'
Complete this BTS lyric from 'Dynamite': 'Shining through the city with a little _____.'
Complete this Ellie Goulding lyric from 'Love Me Like You Do': 'I didn't know that I was _____ for somebody like you.'
Complete this Sia lyric from 'Cheap Thrills': 'I don't need no _____, I just need a beat.'
Complete this Rihanna lyric from 'Work': 'Work, work, work, work, work, _____.'
Complete this The Chainsmokers lyric from 'Closer': 'So baby pull me closer, in the backseat of your __________.'
Complete this Ed Sheeran lyric from 'Shape of You': 'I'm in love with the shape of you. We push and pull like a _______ do'
Complete this Billie Eilish lyric from 'Bad Guy': 'I'm that bad type, make your mama sad type, make your _________ mad tight.'
Complete this Lil Nas X lyric from 'Old Town Road': 'I got the _____ in the back, horse tack is attached.'
Complete this Post Malone lyric from 'Sunflower': 'Callin' it quits now, baby, I'm a _______.'
Complete this Ariana Grande lyric from '7 Rings': 'Yeah, my receipts be lookin' like _____.'
Complete this Notorious B.I.G. lyric from 'Juicy': 'It was all a dream, I used to read _____ magazine.'
Complete this 2Pac lyric from 'California Love': 'We in that sunshine state, where the bomb-ass hemp be. The state where you never find a dance floor ________.'
In the song 'C.R.E.A.M' by the Wu-Tang Clan, the acronmym stands for '_______ Rules Everything Around Me.'
